# HC IX Author Provenance Note — Spiral Time (Carey, March 2009) — v1.5

Date: 2026-02-23

## Status

This is an **author provenance note**. It is not part of the formal equation canon, but it records why *interiority* and *Spiral Time* are foundational in HC IX.

## The shift (March 2009)

- I held a Cartesian graph in mind: a sinusoid above the x‑axis.
- I shifted perspective **to the x‑axis itself** (from “looking at” to “looking along”).
- From that stance, the sinusoid became a **spiral**.

## The joining

- Hermetic: “As above, so below.” (exteriority)
- Haanel: “As within, so without.” (interiority)

That day the circle closed: questions from 1983–1989 came home, and Spiral Time became inevitable.
